subject: SGR 1900+14: CORRECTION to GCN 4923
body:
S. Barthelmy (GSFC)
on behalf of the Swift-BAT team:

In GCN 4923, we incorrectly reported that the kT for the blackbody fit
was kT = 17.5 -7.9,+15.7 [keV] (90% confidence).  The correct value
is kT = 7.6 -1.1/+1.0 [keV] (90% confidence level).

We apologize for any inconvenience.
